name: JoAi: Upload to Desk

description.en: Upload a file to your agent's desk so it can be used in actions.
description.de: Lade eine Datei auf den Schreibtisch deines Agenten hoch, damit sie in Aktionen verwendet werden kann.
description.es: Upload a file to your agent's desk so it can be used in actions.
description.fr: Upload a file to your agent's desk so it can be used in actions.
description.ro: Upload a file to your agent's desk so it can be used in actions.
description.it: Upload a file to your agent's desk so it can be used in actions.

bot: Upload a file to the agent's desk. Collect the file and whether to pin it (default: yes).

inputs.name: File

description.en: The file to upload to your desk
description.de: Die Datei, die auf deinen Schreibtisch hochgeladen werden soll
description.es: The file to upload to your desk
description.fr: The file to upload to your desk
description.ro: The file to upload to your desk
description.it: The file to upload to your desk

inputs.bot: File to upload. Accept any document, image, or PDF.

inputs.name: Pin to desk

description.en: Keep this file pinned on your desk for future conversations
description.de: Diese Datei für zukünftige Gespräche am Schreibtisch anheften
description.es: Keep this file pinned on your desk for future conversations
description.fr: Keep this file pinned on your desk for future conversations
description.ro: Keep this file pinned on your desk for future conversations
description.it: Keep this file pinned on your desk for future conversations

inputs.bot: Should this file be pinned to the desk? Default yes.

success.de: Datei wurde auf deinen Schreibtisch hochgeladen.
